purpose: Paper-facing chemistry/materials showcase demos with public benchmark or paper-derived gold standards.
selection_rules: Every demo must start from the DeerFlow front end.
Every demo must produce machine-readable artifacts.
Gold labels must come from public benchmark data, official splits, expert annotations, or published paper data.
Primary and secondary metrics must be standard scientific or benchmark metrics, not subjective custom scores.
Workflow completion can be logged as run metadata, but it must not be reported as a scientific evaluation metric.

front_end_input: One isolated predefined Matbench fold per front-end session
Labeled training CSV and unlabeled test CSV
demos.hidden_gold: Retained Matbench target labels for the uploaded test fold.
demos.superiority_claim: Shows DeerFlow can autonomously organize a materials ML workflow from uploaded data to benchmark-style predictions and plots.

front_end_input: allowed descriptors or model scores defined by the public task
task instruction to rank/screen stable materials
demos.hidden_gold: PBE DFT reference stability/energy labels from Matbench Discovery.
demos.superiority_claim: Shows DeerFlow can support materials screening/discovery rather than only property regression.

front_end_input: MoleculeNet dataset subset such as BBBP, BACE, HIV, ClinTox, ESOL, or FreeSolv
SMILES table without hidden test labels
split metadata such as scaffold split
demos.hidden_gold: Official molecular property labels from MoleculeNet data.
demos.superiority_claim: Shows chemistry-specific tool use through SMILES validation, RDKit features, modeling, and error analysis.

front_end_input: test spectra without hidden dihedral labels
demos.hidden_gold: Published or released C-N=N-C dihedral angles.
demos.superiority_claim: Shows DeerFlow can handle domain-specific spectroscopy preprocessing and structure-property regression.

front_end_input: materials science article snippets or full text from the benchmark
target schema for entities, relations, or slots
demos.hidden_gold: Expert annotations from SOFC-Exp or MatSci-NLP converted to the selected schema.
demos.superiority_claim: Shows DeerFlow can convert literature into structured, source-traceable materials data using public annotations.
